title: phyllophyton nivale
intro: Phyllophyton nivale is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and promoting relaxation. In herbal preparations, Phyllophyton nivale is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments for skin and wound care.
